'''Vryssa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vryssa system/Legends|Vryssa system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that hosted an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] base. [[Buldobeast]]s were commonly found on this planet. At some point in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the entire garrison was wiped out by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] while pursuing the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Rivo Xarran]].
